scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin,frontend -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @carbon/api" "npm run dev -w @carbon/admin" "npm run dev -w @carbon/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @carbon/api && npm run build -w @carbon/admin && npm run build -w @carbon/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @carbon/api && npm run lint -w @carbon/admin && npm run lint -w @carbon/frontend
